task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Nursing Fundamentals (NUR301) course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The course name 'Nursing Fundamentals' or shortname 'NUR301' is visible in the page header, breadcrumbs, or navigation menu.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the grade letters configuration or edit page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page titled 'Grade letters', 'Edit grade letters', or similar is visible within the course settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the option to override site defaults.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox labeled 'Override site defaults' (or similar) is checked, enabling the input fields for custom grade letters.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct custom grade letters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input fields for grade letters contain A, A-, B+, B, B-, C+, C, C-, D, F in descending order.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct percentage boundaries for each grade letter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input fields for grade boundaries contain 93, 90, 87, 83, 80, 77, 73, 70, 60, and 0 corresponding to the respective grade letters.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the changes and the new grade letters are applied to the course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A saved confirmation or a view of the grade letters table showing the updated letters and boundaries (A: 93%, A-: 90%, etc.) for the NUR301 course.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser with the LMS interface being interacted with, not a terminal, script, or API client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual LMS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL and interface match a real web application, not a local HTML file, text editor, or mock page.

integrity.description: Verify the results are not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element/DevTools) are open in the screenshots showing the final result.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring custom grade letters for the 'Nursing Fundamentals' (NUR301) course. The exact boundaries to verify are: A (93%), A- (90%), B+ (87%), B (83%), B- (80%), C+ (77%), C (73%), C- (70%), D (60%), F (0%). A tolerance of ±0.5% is acceptable.
